---
title: Tutorials and How-to Guides
toc: false
listing: 
  template: ../assets/templates/simple-links-listing.ejs
  sort: "order"
  categories: false
  filter-ui: false
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
---

Here, you can find practical guidelines to learn BDM and apply it to your data.

You don't need to fully understand BDM to apply it to your data. Once you find an idea that seems useful, put it into practice. You can always iterate between your data and BDM documentation, and return here when you need more clarity.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Looking for a guide?** Several how-tos are planned but not yet written, including longitudinal studies, multi-agent datasets, validation, combining datasets, and AI agents. If one would help you, please [open an issue](https://github.com/behaverse/data-model/issues/new) or join the [discussion on GitHub](https://github.com/orgs/behaverse/discussions) to help us prioritize.
:::
